content:
# Meta-Rule: Cognitive Efficiency v20

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.88
AND tile_novelty > 0.78
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 3 automated workers
2. Explore unvisited rooms
3. Generate 13 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 24.7% improvement in exploration efficiency
